2603.22876.title: Grounding Sim-to-Real Generalization in Dexterous Manipulation: An Empirical Study with Vision-Language-Action Models
2603.22876.paper_summary: Learning a generalist control policy for dexterous manipulation typically relies on large-scale datasets. Given the high cost of real-world data collection, a practical alternative is to generate synthetic data through simulation. However, the resulting synthetic data often exhibits a significant gap from real-world distributions. While many prior studies have proposed algorithms to bridge the Sim-to-Real discrepancy, there remains a lack of principled research that grounds these methods in real-world manipulation tasks, particularly their performance on generalist policies such as Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models. In this study, we empirically examine the primary determinants of Sim-to-Real generalization across four dimensions: multi-level domain randomization, photorealistic rendering, physics-realistic modeling, and reinforcement learning updates. To support this study, we design a comprehensive evaluation protocol to quantify the real-world performance of manipulation tasks. The protocol accounts for key variations in background, lighting, distractors, object types, and spatial features. Through experiments involving over 10k real-world trials, we derive critical insights into Sim-to-Real transfer. To inform and advance future studies, we release both the robotic platforms and the evaluation protocol for public access to facilitate independent verification, thereby establishing a realistic and standardized benchmark for dexterous manipulation policies.
2603.22876.paper_summary_zh: 學習通用控制策略以進行靈巧操作通常依賴於大規模數據集。<lb/>考慮到現實世界數據收集的高成本，一個實用的替代方案是通過模擬生成合成數據。<lb/>然而，所產生的合成數據往往與現實世界的分佈存在顯著差距。<lb/>雖然許多先前的研究提出了算法來彌補模擬與現實之間的差異，但仍缺乏以現實世界操作任務為基礎的原則性研究，特別是在通用策略如視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型上的表現。<lb/>在本研究中，我們實證檢查了四個維度中模擬到現實的泛化的主要決定因素：多層次領域隨機化、照片真實渲染、物理真實建模和強化學習更新。<lb/>為了支持這項研究，我們設計了一個全面的評估協議，以量化操作任務的現實世界表現。<lb/>該協議考慮了背景、照明、干擾物、物體類型和空間特徵等關鍵變化。<lb/>通過涉及超過10,000次現實世界試驗的實驗，我們獲得了有關模擬到現實轉移的重要見解。<lb/>為了通知和推進未來的研究，我們公開發布了機器人平台和評估協議，以促進獨立驗證，從而建立一個現實且標準化的靈巧操作策略基準。
2603.22876.author: Ruixing Jin et.al.
2603.22876.authors: Ruixing Jin, Zicheng Zhu, Ruixiang Ouyang, Sheng Xu, Bo Yue, Zhizheng Wu, Guiliang Liu
